prompt: Trip the auto-compaction breaker, recover with /compact, and prove auto compaction resumes.

steps.prompt: Use the read tool to read LONG_CONTEXT.md completely. Then answer exactly `Breaker prep ready`.
Do not use any tools. Answer exactly `Breaker failure one`.

Do not use any tools. Answer exactly `Breaker paused but replying`.
